title: Fall backwards into the void with a smile and peace sign — the 4-paragraph identity manifesto
html:
Fall backwards into the void with a smile and peace sign — the 4-paragraph identity manifesto

Source: 2026-02-26 Apple Note. Four paragraphs, all start with "I want to be the motherfucker that..." — the most polished single-statement of identity in the entire corpus. ~2 months before vault creation. Written in Austin.

TL;DR

  • "I want to be the motherfucker that falls backwards into the void with a smile on his face and a peace sign thrown up, and maneuvers that motherfucker like it's the time of his life." — directly evolves the Sept 2024 "don't be afraid to peer into the void" line into an active embrace.
  • "I want to be the motherfucker that leads his crew in battle, head first. He can get his arm chopped off, his eyes speared, his soul on the verge of collapse, but it does not matter because there's zero wavering. It's just pure soul fire, God."
  • The contrast / butterfly mode: "But I also want to have the contrast where you would never know that about me. When I'm with my family, my children, my wife, I'm a butterfly. I'm tender. I'm a goofy little playmate." — the dual-identity claim (warrior outside, butterfly inside).
  • The reality-bending claim: "Not giving a flying fuck what people tell you to do because you decide the outcome of things. You bend reality to your will."
  • Same vocabulary as the Shanghai manifesto — soul fire, void, walk-as-god-sent — but voice is more confident, more specific, more visceral. Two years of self-talk distilled into one polished paragraph-set.
  • This is the single most-quotable note in the 2026 corpus — a future synthesis page on Yahir's identity arc would cite this as the climactic statement.

Key quote

"I want to live my life on my own terms, weird terms, own a cord, hacky and genius."

Pattern observed

The manifesto-style note evolved from 2024 → 2026:

  • 2024 09 12 never forget do whatever: 14 short bullets, second-person, Shanghai-era hesitancy
  • 2025 03 15 life feels heavy: dip-and-pivot, paragraph form, manifesto-pivot at the end
  • This note (2026-02-26): pure declarative, first-person, four polished paragraphs

The shift from "you are an abundant source of good" (Sept 2024) to "you decide the outcome of things, you bend reality to your will" (Feb 2026) is the clearest measure of voice evolution in the corpus.

Open questions

  • What triggered this? (No context in the note itself — between the Emily issue brief same day and Rankett's hard-launch period.)
  • Does Yahir actually have the "butterfly with family" mode? (Family notes like 2025 06 21 on bubbas dominic suggest yes — protective, observational, not posturing.)

Related

  • 2024 09 12 never forget do whatever — direct predecessor, same vocabulary
  • 2025 03 15 life feels heavy — the manifesto-pivot in dip context
  • soul as beacon
  • max effort commit
  • austin tx
